calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-01-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok and Shauna Vantree. Case not called on the record. Proceedings not reported.

Petitioner Nattira Inkhong present in court with Court Certified Interpeter Sunai Tepraseuth.
Petitioner sworn.
Proof of Publication on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and the petition should be granted.

The court grants the petition for Change of Name to new name Nattira Kittirattanachat.

Decree Changing Name signed by the court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-21-2015 Reset To Oct-01-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
